subcodes.first_line: O thou who art inebriated by the heavenly cup! In the wilderness of Sinai in the Holy Land, in the hallowed precincts of the vale of Towa
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مخمور جام الهی در بریه ارض مقدسه صحرای سیناء بقعه مبارکه وادی طوی طور تجلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech
